# BRIEF

## User-Facing Goal

Project owners can manage translated image sets, and visitors see a compact language selector only when needed.

## Success Criteria

- Projects include language variants.
- Existing/default assets continue to render.
- Editor renders one image section per language.
- New uploads are assigned to the selected language.
- Public page filters images by selected language.
- Language selector is hidden for one-language pages.

## UX Notes

Language sections should reuse the existing images UI as much as possible.

## Risks Or Tradeoffs

Native drag-and-drop remains basic on touch devices.
